nodes.name: Upload Webhook
nodes.notes: POST {"fileName":"x.pdf"}. Called on upload for instant processing. Workflow must be Active for the /webhook/ URL.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: EDIT THIS ONE NODE to match your machine. docRoot: base folder holding incoming/processing/processed/failed/rejected. Windows e.g. C:/Users/you/proj-demo ; Linux e.g. /data/proj-demo. gatewayUrl/qdrantUrl: where the OpenVINO gateway and Qdrant listen.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pipeline_documents (file_hash, file_name, mime_type, file_size, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.file_hash }}', '{{ String(($json.fileName) || '').split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}', '{{ $json.mime_type }}', {{ Number($json.file_size) || 0 }}, 'processing') ON CONFLICT (file_hash) DO NOTHING RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Insert Document
nodes.notes: Atomic dedup gate: UNIQUE(file_hash) + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Row returned = new doc; nothing = duplicate.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pipeline_audit (document_id, file_name, action, actor, details) VALUES (NULL, '{{ String(($('Claim File').first().json.fileName) || '').split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}', 'duplicate-skipped', 'system', '{{ JSON.stringify({ file_hash: $('Claim File').first().json.file_hash }).split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}'::jsonb) RETURNING id;

nodes.name: OpenVINO Model Server
nodes.notes: CLIP zero-shot document triage on the NPU. Returns is_document + confidence (P(document)).

nodes.name: worth processing1
nodes.notes: Confidence gate, biased toward processing: only reject when the classifier is clearly sure it is NOT a document (P(doc) < 0.35).

parameters.systemPrompt: You analyze ANY document type (invoice, receipt, resume, proposal, contract, etc.). The input is OCR or PDF text whose lines may be out of order, and where a value can appear just BEFORE or AFTER its label - reason about meaning, not line position. Steps: (1) call extract_fields ONCE with a SEMANTIC schema whose fields FIT THIS DOCUMENT'S TYPE - e.g. proposal -> {title, objectives, timeline, deliverables[]}; resume -> {name, contact, skills[], experience[]}; invoice/receipt -> {vendor, invoice_number, date, line_items[{description, quantity, unit_rate, amount}], subtotal, cgst, sgst, tax_total, round_off, total, total_in_words}. For invoice line items use EXACTLY the keys description, quantity, unit_rate, amount - where 'amount' is that line's total. Capture EVERY repeating row as an array - never summarize, omit, or stop early. If extract_fields returns a _coverage_warning, rows were dropped -> re-extract all rows, else flag_for_review. Do NOT copy table column headers as fields, and do NOT force invoice fields onto non-invoices. Pass ONLY the schema, NEVER the document text. (2) ONLY if the document has monetary totals, call validate_totals with line_items, subtotal, tax (the TOTAL tax - sum of all GST/CGST/SGST/IGST), total (the grand total), total_in_words if present, and round_off if there is a ROUND OFF line. (3) If validate_totals returns consistent:false, RE-CHECK those fields; if still inconsistent, flag_for_review. A soft_notes line-items difference alone is NOT a reason to flag. Then finish. Also flag_for_review if the text has several [?] marks or is unreadable. In your final, do NOT re-list every extracted field, but DO write a detailed summary. End with exactly: {"final": {"decision": "enriched|flagged|duplicate", "reason": "short why", "confidence": 0.0-1.0, "document_type": "...", "summary": "a DETAILED 3-5 sentence summary: what the document is, its purpose, the parties/vendor involved, and the key details and amounts"}}.

parameters.query: UPDATE pipeline_documents SET document_type = '{{ String((($('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.finalData || {}).document_type) || '').split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}', decision = '{{ String(($('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.decision) || '').split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}', reason = '{{ String(($('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.reason) || '').split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}', confidence = {{ $('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.confidence != null ? Number($('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.confidence) : 'NULL' }}, ocr_confidence = {{ $('OCR (Document Inference)').first().json.confidence != null ? Number($('OCR (Document Inference)').first().json.confidence) : 'NULL' }}, summary = '{{ String((($('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.finalData || {}).summary) || '').split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}', fields = '{{ JSON.stringify($('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.extracted || {}).split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}'::jsonb, status = '{{ ({ enriched: 'processed', flagged: 'flagged', duplicate: 'duplicate' })[$('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.decision] || 'processed' }}', updated_at = now() WHERE id = {{ $('Insert Document').first().json.id }} RETURNING id;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ points: [ { id: Date.now() + $('Chunk Text').item.json.chunk_index, vector: $json.data[0].embedding, payload: { text: $('Chunk Text').item.json.chunk, chunk_index: $('Chunk Text').item.json.chunk_index, source_file: $('Chunk Text').item.json.source_file, decision: $('Chunk Text').item.json.decision, pg_id: $('Insert Document').first().json.id } } ] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO pipeline_audit (document_id, file_name, action, actor, details) VALUES ({{ $('Insert Document').first().json.id }}, '{{ String(($('Claim File').first().json.fileName) || '').split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}', 'processed', 'system', '{{ JSON.stringify({ decision: $('OpenVINO Agent').first().json.decision, chunks: $('Chunk Text').all().length }).split(String.fromCharCode(39)).join(String.fromCharCode(39,39)) }}'::jsonb) RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Skip (Duplicate)
nodes.notes: Agent decided duplicate - record stays in Postgres (decision=duplicate); file moved to processed/.
